content: TASK-062 checkpoint done: Added docs/AI_AUTHORING_GUIDE.md as the AI-facing entry point for agents asked to author ArchMap DSL from the v0.1.x repo/tag. The guide covers what to output, fast information gathering, core syntax rules, concept distinctions (subgraph/zone/boundary/layer and overlays), common vocabulary, metadata patterns for auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/screenflow, final quality checks, and a copy-paste delegation prompt. README now links the guide near SYNTAX, and SYNTAX links back to the AI authoring guide for AI-prompted authoring. Verification: documentation diff reviewed and npm run typecheck passed. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
